title: Amazing Friends: The Art of Disaster
original_title: Amazing Friends: The Art of Disaster
overview: When a reality-bending event known as "The Great Blur" begins deconstructing the rigid perfection of Clearview, Mad Cooper must unite an unlikely group of friends with unconventional talents. Together, they navigate a shifting, abstract landscape to stop a mastermind who plans to reboot existence by erasing anything he deems a "flaw"—starting with them.
